en.extract:
The black-billed seed finch (Sporophila atrirostris) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae.
It is found in the western Amazon Basin (Ecuador, Peru and northwestern Bolivia).

The '''black-billed seed finch''' ('''''Sporophila atrirostris''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Thraupidae]].
It is found in the western [[Amazon Basin]] ([[Ecuador]], [[Peru]] and northwestern [[Bolivia]]).
